To

BSE limited 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbo i - 400 001 
Scrip Code: 539448 
Sub 
Intimation for Board Meeting and Earnings Call under Regulation 29 and 30 of the 
SEBI (listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations. 2015 
("SEBI LODA Regulations") 
In compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODA Regulations, we would like to inform you 
that a meeting of the Board of Directors of lnterGlobe Aviation limited ("Company") is 
scheduled to be held on Wednesday, August 3, 2022, inter-alia, to consider and approve the 
unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results ("Financial Results") of the Company 
for the quarter ended on June 30, 2022, subject to a limited review by the Statutory Auditors. 
In compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 read with the 
lnterGlobe Aviation limited - Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by 
Designated Persons, we hereby inform you that the trading window for trading in securities of 
the Company by the Designated Persons was closed with effect from June 23, 2022. 
In the absence of unusual developments, the trading window will reopen 48 hours after the 
announcement of Financial Results by the Company. 
lnterGlobe Avlotlon Limited 
Registered Office: Upper Ground Floor, Thopar House, Gate No. 2, Western Wing, 124 Janpath, New Delhi - 11 D 001, India, M +91 9650098905, 
F +91 11 43513200,Emall: corporote@golndlgo.in 
Corporate Office: Levell, Tower C, Global Business Park, MG Road, Gurgaon • 122 002, Haryana, India. T +91 124 435 2500 F + 91 124 406 8536 
CIN no.: l62100Dl2004PLC129768 
goindigo.ln

This is for your information and record. 
Thanking you, 
For lnterGlobe Aviation Limited 
Sanjay Gupta

InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Results on August 
03, 2022 
Gurgaon, July 26, 2022: IndiGo will be announcing its First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 results on 
August 03, 2022. 
 
The company will conduct a 60 minutes conference call at 17:00 hours IST on August 03, 2022 (open 
to investors/ analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the Company’s
qa_section:
performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference call, please 
dial the numbers provided below. 
 
Results will be available around 16:00 hours on Wednesday, August 03, 2022 at the Company’s 
website (www.goindigo.in) or on the exchange website (www.nseindia.com / www.bseindia.com). 
 
The call will also be recorded and will be archived at www.goindigo.in. In addition, a transcript of 
the conference call will be available on www.goindigo.in 
 
Date and Time 
August 03, 2022 at: 
17:00 hours IST 
19:30 hours HKT 
11:30 hours UTC 
07:30 hours ET

call
